title: Document 17
description: Document 17 is a mod that adds in; 30+ characters (armors) two double chest's worth of items, a whole assortment of bosses to fight. and new- interesting ways to play the game. along with several base superpowers for players to use. want superheros? here.
body:
WELCOME- to the world of document 17! Roleplay made mod, mod made show, abandoned show, return mod! 

in other words, this world has been through QUITE the journey. superheros and villains, love and hate. but you don't care about that do you? you just want to play the mod!

well today is your lucky day, after 20 different releases (across platforms) the mod now has: over 30 unique characters, and only one of which has a possibly copyrighted name. (working on that, thats a new development) 

We also have a brand new dimension, around 8 new ores (metals used in the mod, and other things you can find) new custom blocks with unique functionality, and- my new most favorite thing in the entire mod. 

The symbol suit- BUT. we'll get back to that. 

first off, to play with the mod, download it. once downloaded, you'll load into a world where you will be greeted by the "new world" advancement. if you follow it's instructions, it basically tells you the basics of how to get the character suits. 

but, one thing you don't know, is that I'm adding more ways to get them. i'm keeping the computer, but that's only for the suits that existed in the original mod! you'll soon be able to default craft them with a crafting table, but honestly the computer will still be cheaper.

One thing i want to add is the Reckon quest system and the Reckon gauntlet so you can access them. but that's a little advanced for me right now, so one day. just not today. 

oh, also- the use the symbol suit, put the item you want to fuse with in your off hand and press "R". if it's a compatible item (i CANNOT do every item in the game, that would crash it- i think) you'll transform. half human, half whatever you merged with. 

also go check it out on Mcreator if you want to support us:[https://mcreator.net/modification/106971/document-17](https://mcreator.net/modification/106971/document-17)

Find it on curseforge if you... for some reason, don't want to use it here: 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/document-17-rebranded/files/7679145

Check out our Youtube channel for updates and posts on the mod: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9G6sK83iKkpOqfOxxZpwKg 

Good ay mate, see yer on the flip side!
